title: schmidelia cominia
intro: Schmidelia cominia, also known as the Bitter Broom or Schmidelia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Ochnaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its bitter compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Schmidelia cominia include its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Schmidelia cominia can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support the body's natural defenses and promote overall well-being.
